hero.subtitle: Vacation apartment in the Old Town of Villajoyosa
hero.location_info: Inside the walled enclosure and a stone's throw from the Main Beach

PresentationHouse.title: COSTERETA n1
PresentationHouse.subtitle: Apartment at 1 Calle Costereta, 1st floor, 03570 Villajoyosa, Alicante
PresentationHouse.mainImageAlt: Main presentation image of the apartment

DescriptionHouse.title: The essence of La Vila, rooted in history
DescriptionHouse.p1: Costera N1 is located in the heart of the historic walled old town. Enjoy the tranquility of its pedestrian streets and the authenticity of a neighborhood with its own rhythm, just steps away from the Church of the Assumption.
DescriptionHouse.p2: Access to the Main Beach (Playa Centro) is a signature feature of our home: a short stroll among the famous colorful facades takes you from the quiet of the city walls to the vibrant promenade in just minutes.
DescriptionHouse.p3: From our elevated location, we offer a unique perspective away from the crowds of large apartment blocks. It is the ideal retreat to feel like part of the community—whether popping out for fresh bread or sharing a drink with the locals.
DescriptionHouse.p4: We combine the original structure with a modern and functional interior designed for relaxation. With all amenities at hand and the TRAM station nearby, the entire Costa Blanca is within your reach.

sectionZero.title:
COSTERETA n1
the heart of La Vila
sectionZero.subtitle: A journey through what awaits you just a few steps away

section1.overtitle: 01. The Heart of Color: Costera de la Mar
section1.title: Live in the icon of the Costa Blanca
section1.p1: You are staying on Costera de la Mar, the most photographed and vibrant street in Villajoyosa. This historic axis is more than just an address; it is the bridge linking the legacy of the walled city with its seafaring soul.
section1.p2: Wake up surrounded by colorful facades and the Mediterranean breeze just steps from your door.

section2.title: Just meters away from the sand
section2.p1: Forget the car and unnecessary turns. From the heart of the old town, a direct path leads you straight to the Promenade and Playa Centro beach. In less than 5 minutes, you will go from the silence of cobbled streets to the vibrant bustle of the Mediterranean.
section2.p2: Ideal for that first morning swim or a sunset stroll.

section3.title: A feast for the senses
section3.p1: La Vila tastes of salt and cocoa. You are just around the corner from the best traditional taverns and harbor rice restaurants. Furthermore, the aroma of artisanal chocolate will guide you on a walk to the city's historic factories. A privileged location for lovers of fine food and authentic neighborhood life.

BookingCTA.title: Have you picked the dates for your next getaway?
BookingCTA.description: Costera N1 awaits you in the heart of the old town. Check availability and book securely through our official booking manager.
